evals.prompt: Set up our Instagram strategy for the tech gadgets niche channel to drive affiliate sales to remotetechgear.com.
evals.expected_output: Cover Shopping setup, Stories link sticker, link in bio, and Reels product demos — plus posting schedule (Wed/Fri/Sat, 8am/1pm/7pm) and 1/3 content rule.
expectations: The response covers Instagram Shopping setup with product tagging
The response includes Stories link sticker pointing to remotetechgear.com
The response specifies posting schedule: Wed/Fri/Sat at 8am/1pm/7pm
The response applies the 1/3 content rule (product showcases, tutorials, UGC)
The response mentions engagement target (3.5%+) and shopping conversion target (2.5%+)

evals.prompt: Our tech gadgets Reel got 50% average watch time and 1.2% engagement rate. What needs to change?
evals.expected_output: Diagnose in order: first 3 seconds hook, text overlays (85% silent viewers), loop ending, golden hour engagement, caption CTA.
expectations: The response checks the first 3 seconds for a visual interrupt hook first
The response mentions text overlays because 85% of viewers watch without sound
The response checks whether the ending triggers a replay loop
The response identifies the golden hour (first 60 minutes) engagement window
The response gives a specific fix for each identified failure point

evals.prompt: Write the Instagram posting schedule and content plan for @TheRightClip conservative content channel for this week.
evals.expected_output: Specify Wed/Fri/Sat posting days at 8am/1pm/7pm, daily Stories, Reels as primary format, question-ending captions.
expectations: The response specifies posting days as Wed, Fri, Sat (not daily)
The response specifies times as 8am, 1pm, 7pm in audience timezone
The response includes daily Stories even on non-post days
The response recommends Reels as the primary format (not static posts)
The response ends captions with a question to drive comments
